TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Kingdalruwane = Gaga mniq Pingtung Santimnsyang ka alang Kingdalruwane. 17 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 62 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 98% niqan 61 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 2% niqan 1 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Rukai66%, Paiwan21%, ni rahuq na o11%.
S.PHON: = kiŋdalɾuwanə = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ santimnsjaŋ ka alaŋ kiŋdalɾuwanə. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, ** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan * ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, ɾukai**%, paiwan**%, ni ɾaħuq na o**%.
S.FORM: = Kingdalruwane = Gaga mniq Pingtung Santimnsyang ka alang Kingdalruwane. 17 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 62 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 98% niqan 61 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 2% niqan 1 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Rukai66%, Paiwan21%, ni rahuq na o11%.
S.PHON: = kiŋdalɾuwanə = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ santimnsjaŋ ka alaŋ kiŋdalɾuwanə. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, ** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan * ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, ɾukai**%, paiwan**%, ni ɾaħuq na o**%.
